CustomField.formula: IF( AND( MEDDPICC_Champion_Status__c = "🟢", MEDDPICC_Pain_Status__c = "🟢", MEDDPICC_Decision_Criteria_Status__c = "🟢", MEDDPICC_Decision_Process_Status__c = "🟢", MEDDPICC_Economic_Buyer_Status__c = "🟢", MEDDPICC_Metrics_Status__c = "🟢", MEDDPICC_Paper_Process_Status__c = "🟢" ), "🟢 You’re all set! All MEDDPICC stations are completed", TRIM( IF(AND(MEDDPICC_Champion_Status__c <> "🟢", MEDDPICC_Champion_Status__c <> ""), MEDDPICC_Champion_Status__c & " Champion ", "") & IF(AND(MEDDPICC_Pain_Status__c <> "🟢", MEDDPICC_Pain_Status__c <> ""), MEDDPICC_Pain_Status__c & " Pain ", "") & IF(AND(MEDDPICC_Decision_Criteria_Status__c <> "🟢", MEDDPICC_Decision_Criteria_Status__c <> ""), MEDDPICC_Decision_Criteria_Status__c & " DecCriteria ", "") & IF(AND(MEDDPICC_Decision_Process_Status__c <> "🟢", MEDDPICC_Decision_Process_Status__c <> ""), MEDDPICC_Decision_Process_Status__c & " DecProcess ", "") & IF(AND(MEDDPICC_Economic_Buyer_Status__c <> "🟢", MEDDPICC_Economic_Buyer_Status__c <> ""), MEDDPICC_Economic_Buyer_Status__c & " EB ", "") & IF(AND(MEDDPICC_Metrics_Status__c <> "🟢", MEDDPICC_Metrics_Status__c <> ""), MEDDPICC_Metrics_Status__c & " Metrics ", "") & IF(AND(MEDDPICC_Paper_Process_Status__c <> "🟢", MEDDPICC_Paper_Process_Status__c <> ""), MEDDPICC_Paper_Process_Status__c & " PaperProcess ", "") ) )
CustomField.label: MEDDPICC Stations Line
